authority: Repository merge, documentation, and local verification only; no Photon, Sendblue, Vercel, deployment, credential, webhook, message, provider readback, or mutation authority.

docsMaintainerImpact.evidence: Merged the implemented Photon SPEC, completed plan, research update, and current routes while preserving the newer main harness lifecycle.
Added the accepted Channel, Photon, and Sendblue public package routes and retained app command ownership.
Merged the Schema-driven Channel transport boundary and retained the current main architecture/control guidance.
No generated API reference or public website surface is owned by this repository merge.
Merged target-owned Photon and dual-Channel operational procedures without executing them.
Merged bounded dated Preview and Production receipts and preserved their explicit non-current provider-truth limits.
No skill bytes or mirrors changed in the merge; current main skill policy remains authoritative.
Merged package/build boundaries while preserving the current main harness evaluation gate and CI command.
Merged the provider and vertical test suites; the accepted result vocabulary remains provider acceptance rather than handset delivery.
Photon rollout material is completed history; the unrelated Codex Terra work remains the only active implementation.

harnessDisposition.reason: The merge adds package, runbook, proof, and completed-history paths but does not change the HGI-307 scenario manifest, expected owner set, worker identity, skill bytes, or accepted worker reports.
harnessDisposition.limitation: This correction does not requalify HGI-307 against Photon behavior and does not upgrade any dated Photon receipt into current provider truth.

retainedFailure.lastSuccessfulStep: Effect, boundary, documentation, skill, authority, control, and twelve-journey verification gates passed.
retainedFailure.observedState: HARNESS-DOCS-INVENTORY and HARNESS-README-INVENTORY rejected the pre-merge current path inventory.
retainedFailure.recovery: Refresh only the current path counts and digests while preserving the original epoch, reports, scenario manifest, and historical acceptance receipt.
retainedFailure.nonClaim: An inventory mismatch is not a Photon, Sendblue, Vercel, deployment, message, or Production result.

checks.command: bun run --filter @bundjil/channel test; bun run --filter @bundjil/photon test; bun run --filter @bundjil/sendblue test
checks.result: Channel passed 2 tests, Photon passed 25 tests, and Sendblue passed 9 tests.

checks.command: BUNDJIL_EXECUTOR_MCP_URL='<approved-host-shaped synthetic URL>' BUNDJIL_EXECUTOR_API_KEY='<test-only value>' bun run --cwd apps/agent test
checks.result: The agent built and passed 57 tests without an authenticated Executor request.

checks.command: BUNDJIL_EXECUTOR_MCP_URL='<approved-host-shaped synthetic URL>' BUNDJIL_EXECUTOR_API_KEY='<test-only value>' bun run verification
checks.result: Effect, boundary, docs, skills, authority, controls, twelve journeys, HGI-307 inventory, 87 tooling tests, format/lint, Knip, eight package typechecks, and fourteen package build/test tasks passed.

limitations: The original HGI-307 epoch remains bound to its recorded base commit and worker reports.
The merge preserves dated Photon proof as evidence only and performs no external readback.
The checked-out main worktree contains unrelated local edits and is intentionally untouched.
nonClaims: No provider state, credential, deployment, webhook, line, user, message, handset, billing, or Production system was read or changed.
No recurring automation or future provider operation is authorised by this receipt.
